ACCT_1002.query: My 4G data keeps cutting out near downtown. It's been happening all week.
ACCT_1002.response_summary: Advised to toggle airplane mode and reset APN settings. Local tower under maintenance until Jan 15.

ACCT_1002.response_summary: Escalated to field technician team. Ticket #NET-4421 raised. Customer advised to expect resolution within 48 hours.
